name: vscode-laravel
description: Official VS Code extension for Laravel

commands.title: Refactor selected HTML class attribute to Blade directive
Refactor all HTML class attributes to Blade directives
artisan migrate | Run the database migrations
artisan migrate:fresh | Drop all tables and re-run all migrations
artisan migrate:refresh | Reset and re-run all migrations
artisan migrate:rollback | Rollback the last database migration
artisan migrate:status | Show the status of each migration
artisan tinker | Interact with your application
artisan db | Start a new database CLI session
artisan db:show | Display information about the given database
artisan route:list | List all registered routes
artisan pail | Tail the application logs
artisan auth:clear-resets | Flush expired password reset tokens
artisan db:seed | Seed the database with records
artisan db:table | Display information about the given database table
artisan db:wipe | Drop all tables, views, and types
artisan event:list | List the application's events and listeners
artisan key:generate | Set the application key
artisan model:show | Show information about an Eloquent model
artisan pest:dataset | Create a new dataset file
artisan queue:clear | Delete all of the jobs from the specified queue
artisan queue:failed | List all of the failed queue jobs
artisan queue:flush | Flush all of the failed queue jobs
artisan queue:forget | Delete a failed queue job
artisan queue:retry | Retry a failed queue job
artisan schedule:list | List all scheduled tasks
artisan schedule:test | Run a scheduled command
artisan schema:dump | Dump the given database schema
artisan cache:clear | Flush the application cache
artisan vendor:publish | Publish any publishable assets from vendor packages

markdownEnumDescriptions: Auto detect the local PHP environment.
Auto detect PHP version Herd is using for the project.
Auto detect PHP version Valet is using for the project.
Use PHP installed on the local machine.
Laravel.phpEnvironment.markdownDescription: Local PHP environment. If you have a value for `#Laravel.phpCommand#` this setting will be ignored and that value will be used instead.

Laravel.phpCommand.description:
Template for running PHP code. Use {code} as an optional placeholder for the php file to run. e.g. `php "{code}"`.

If no {code} is present, code filepath will be appended to the command.

Laravel.basePath.markdownDescription:
_Relative_ base path for the Laravel project. This is used to resolve paths in the project. e.g. src, code/backend

_Requires extension reload after changing._

Laravel.env.viteQuickFix.description: Enable quickfix for adding VITE_ variables from regular env variables.

Laravel.eloquent.generateDocBlocks.description: Automatically generate Eloquent doc blocks for models as IDE helpers.

Laravel.pest.generateDocBlocks.description: Automatically generate a Pest helper file for test closures to enhance IDE support.

Laravel.pest.helperFilePath.description: Path to the generated Pest helper file, relative to the project root.

Laravel.blade.autoSpaceTags.description: Automatically add spacing around Blade echo and comment tags.

Laravel.pint.runOnSave.description: Automatically run Pint on the current file when saved.

Laravel.artisanMake.explorer.description: Enable Laravel Artisan Make commands in the VSCode explorer.

Laravel.artisanMake.commandPalette.description: Enable Laravel Artisan Make commands in the VSCode command palette.

Laravel.artisanCommands.commandPalette.description: Enable Laravel Artisan commands in the VSCode command palette.

Laravel.appBinding.hover.description: Enable hover information for app bindings.

Laravel.bladeComponent.hover.description: Enable hover information for Blade components.

Laravel.controllerAction.hover.description: Enable hover information for controller actions.

Laravel.livewireComponent.hover.description: Enable hover information for Livewire components.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && tsc && npm run lint
